text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Urk... I feel like my body fat percentage's gone up
a lot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, you have been snacking in your room after
getting back from your part-time jobs, Ines.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But I can't help getting hungry when I handle food
at work...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. I know how that feels, but don't forget to
work up a sweat after you chow down.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Ryan, what's your body fat
percentage?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You wanna see? I'll measure myself right now.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: That's a crazy number. You're pure muscle...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Okay, that's it! I'm going to get fit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I can help you out with that! Let's start with
a hundred squats!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...No, if I want to bulk up, then a workout like
that is just what I need!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Ryan! I'm going to tone up for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Mejiro Ryan's help, Ines Fujin maintains a
healthy physique.
